nasb.text: and to those he said, ‘You also go into the vineyard, and whatever is right I will give you.’ And so they went.

esv.text: and to them he said, ‘You go into the vineyard too, and whatever is right I will give you.’

cnv.text: 就對他們說：‘你們也到葡萄園來吧，我會給你們合理的工錢。’

ccb.text: 就对他们说，‘你们到我的葡萄园来工作吧，我会给你们合理的工钱。’

csbs.text: 就对他们说：‘你们也进葡萄园去吧，理当给的，我会给你们。’
